description: Likely removes distractor colors or extracts/recolors the relevant structure while preserving the canvas size. Removes input color(s) [5]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: color subset. Inferred transformation family: delete/extract/recolor.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_e48d4e1a(I):
    x1 = shape(I)
    x2 = ofcolor(I, FIVE)
    x3 = fill(I, ZERO, x2)
    x4 = leastcolor(x3)
    x5 = size(x2)
    x6 = ofcolor(I, x4)
    x7 = rbind(toobject, I)
    x8 = rbind(colorcount, x4)
    x9 = chain(x8, x7, dneighbors)
    x10 = matcher(x9, FOUR)
    x11 = extract(x6, x10)
    x12 = multiply(DOWN_LEFT, x5)
    x13 = add(x12, x11)
    x14 = canvas(ZERO, x1)
    x15 = fork(combine, vfrontier, hfrontier)
    x16 = x15(x13)
    O = fill(x14, x4, x16)
    return O
